creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This port provides a British English voice for Festival. It depends
on the festival (ports/21182), festlex-poslex (ports/21186) and
festlex-oald (ports/21185) ports.  This is based on the NetBSD port.  
Please retain the line saying so, and the $NetBSD$ RCS tags, when
committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festvox-rab16.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
